mapper.select: select w.*,sum(f.MixedTotal)as MixedTotalYear,sum(f.PureFluxTotal) as PureFluxTotalYear,d.MixedFlow,d.PureGasFlow,d.NegativePressure,d.Temperature,d.OxygenConcentration,d.GasConcentration, d.CarbonDioxideConcentration from wellinfo w LEFT JOIN fluxrealdata f ON w.LocationId=f.LocationId LEFT JOIN demonstrationdata d ON w.LocationId=d.LocationId GROUP BY w.LocationId
